package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_splitaftern_two_index_one_cut: `strings.SplitAfterN(..., 2)[1]` instead of a two-part `strings.Cut(...)` flow.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario667Negative(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return func() bool { _, _, ok := strings.Cut(haystack, needle); return ok }()
}
